ability: 每个夜晚，你可以选择将施法上限的数量+1或-1。
firstNightReminder: Ask the Archmage if they'd like to raise or lower the maximum amount of Spells that can be cast tonight. If they raise, add the "+1 Cast" token and you can cast an additional Spell. If they lower, add the "-1 Cast" token and you can cast one less Spell. Otherwise, you can cast up to [ ⅓ # of players, rounded ] Spells.
otherNightReminder: Ask the Archmage if they'd like to raise or lower the maximum amount of Spells that can be cast tonight. If they raise, add the "+1 Cast" token and you can cast an additional Spell. If they lower, add the "-1 Cast" token and you can cast one less Spell. Otherwise, you can cast up to [ ⅓ # of players, rounded ] Spells.
